pending.name: Nextflex
pending.note: The final-bid process for Nextflex, a Korean flexible circuit board manufacturer, has been delayed, casting uncertainty over the expected ~800 billion KRW (~$580M) sale. No buyers have been announced and the timeline for closing the auction remains unclear.

pending.name: Calisa Acquisition / GoodVision AI
pending.note: Calisa Acquisition announced a de-SPAC combination with GoodVision AI, a computer vision and AI analytics company. The transaction follows GoodVision's admission into NVIDIA's Connect partner ecosystem, lending strategic credibility to the deal.

pending.name: Apple / SigScalr
pending.note: Apple is reported to be acquiring SigScalr, though the deal remains unconfirmed with no valuation disclosed. SigScalr appears to be a data/AI infrastructure company, suggesting Apple may be bolstering its enterprise or on-device AI capabilities.

pending.name: CSL Group / IoTM Solutions
pending.note: CSL Group has acquired IoTM Solutions Ltd, an eSIM management platform provider, to enhance its global eSIM orchestration capabilities.

pending.name: Micron / Texas Wafer Supplier
pending.note: Micron announced a $500M deal to secure wafer supply in Texas, aimed at strengthening its domestic semiconductor supply chain. The transaction appears to involve a fab partnership or supply agreement with a Texas-based wafer producer.

pending.name: Spark AI Foundry Holdings / EdgeMode
pending.note: Spark AI Foundry Holdings LLC submitted a non-binding offer to acquire EdgeMode's ready-to-build 300 MW AI data centre project located in Malpica, Spain. The transaction represents a potential asset sale of European AI infrastructure; deal value has not been disclosed.

pending.name: Skydance / Paramount
pending.note: State attorneys general have filed an antitrust challenge to the proposed Skydance-Paramount merger, alleging antitrust violations that could delay closing.

pending.name: Advasa Holdings, Inc.
pending.note: Advasa Holdings filed an S-1/A amendment with the SEC under ticker ADBT, indicating an updated IPO registration in the software sector (SIC 7372). No proceeds or valuation figures are disclosed in the filing snippet.

pending.name: Anshar Labs / Dealer World
pending.note: Anshar Labs acquired automotive marketing agency Dealer World to extend its Drivvr AI platform into the automotive retail vertical. The transaction also involved a new CEO appointment, signaling a leadership integration strategy. Deal terms were not disclosed.

pending.name: Anthropic / TeraWulf
pending.note: TeraWulf announced a reported $19B deal with Anthropic, featuring a $3.5B upfront payment component. The structure has drawn scrutiny regarding financing adequacy and whether the upfront payment is sufficient relative to total deal value.

pending.name: US Government / Intel
pending.note: Reports indicate the US government is acquiring a 10% minority stake in Intel, representing a significant government intervention in the domestic semiconductor sector.

pending.name: Tencent / Manus
pending.note: Tencent is in talks to acquire a significant minority or controlling stake in Manus, an AI startup, which would make it the largest shareholder per FT/Bloomberg reporting. Deal value and valuation are undisclosed.

pending.name: Nvidia / Lancium
pending.note: Nvidia and unnamed tech firms are reportedly eyeing minority stakes in Lancium, a power infrastructure company that serves as the backbone for the Stargate AI project. The deal structure involves minority stake acquisitions rather than full control.

pending.name: SK Hynix
pending.note: SK Hynix filed a 424B4 prospectus supplement with the SEC, indicating a public equity offering pricing event. The South Korean memory chip maker (DRAM/NAND/HBM) is tapping U.S. capital markets; deal size and proceeds are not disclosed in the filing snippet.

pending.name: EQT / Copia Power
pending.note: EQT is acquiring Copia Power, an integrated power and AI infrastructure platform that develops, owns, and operates large-scale energy and digital infrastructure campuses across the U.S. Copia partners with utilities to expand power capacity and support grid reliability…

pending.name: Micron Technology / GlobalWafers
pending.note: Micron Technology is making a $500M strategic investment in GlobalWafers to secure wafer supply chain relationships.

pending.name: NNS Holding / OCI
pending.note: NNS Holding (Cyprus) is acquiring a stake in OCI N.V. under Dutch public takeover decree rules, indicating a formal tender or stake acquisition process. The transaction structure suggests compliance with Dutch mandatory bid or voluntary tender offer regulations.

pending.name: Ohio Data Center Project
pending.note: A $4 billion data center development proposal in Ohio is reportedly on hold following a tentative deal, with potential Amazon involvement signaling continued hyperscaler-driven infrastructure buildout.

pending.name: Element Solutions / Solutics Advanced Materials
pending.note: Element Solutions has agreed to acquire Solutics Advanced Materials for $14.5 billion in a significant specialty materials deal targeting the semiconductor supply chain. The transaction represents a major consolidation in advanced materials used in chip manufacturing.

pending.name: Spring Valley Acquisition Corp. III / General Fusion
pending.note: General Fusion completed its de-SPAC business combination with Spring Valley Acquisition Corp. III, becoming the first publicly listed fusion energy company and beginning trading on Nasdaq.

pending.name: e& / Vodafone
pending.note: Emirates Telecommunications Group (e&) is divesting its minority stake in Vodafone for $5.95 billion following a strategic portfolio review. The transaction represents a significant exit from e&'s position in the UK-headquartered telecom giant.

pending.name: Meta / Unknown Target
pending.note: Meta is reportedly pursuing a $6.5B move to expand cloud and AI infrastructure capacity. The target and deal structure have not been disclosed; the report characterizes this as a capital deployment that could reflect M&A or elevated capex.

pending.name: Gloo Holdings
pending.note: Gloo Holdings (ticker: GLOO, SIC 7374 – Computer Processing and Data Preparation) filed a 424B4 final IPO prospectus with the SEC on 2026-07-09. No proceeds or pricing details are present in the available snippet.

pending.name: Adobe / Semrush
pending.note: Adobe Inc. (NasdaqGS:ADBE) entered into an Agreement and Plan of Merger to acquire Semrush Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:SEMR) from Siguler Guff & Company, LP, Greycroft Growth II, L.P., managed by Greycroft LP, and others for $2 billion on November 18, 2025.
